first_call.subject: US equity — value tilt
first_call.thesis: 3 engine(s) across 1 independent family -> risk-off. 0 bargains vs 95 expensive/avoid (S&P 500 scan); 2 undervalued vs 21 overvalued (DCF); 72 cheap vs 103 rich on own multiple history. Conviction capped — limited cross-confirmation; needs agreement from independent engine families to rate higher.
first_call.invalidation: Flips if net signal crosses neutral — specifically if the DCF / multiple scans flip to net-rich.
